ddt:Target.Name: USM_C1A_SW3
ddt:Target.Description: The DDT 2000 file is auto generated by Power tool. (DEASIC4/65692/UET Modélisation USM) Version 3.1

Data.Name: C_K_MissionNbrOilFailure
Data.Comment: [-] Number of missions to confirm Oil pressure switch failure [0:1:50]

Data.Name: C_K_StarterDeactivation
Data.Comment: [] Threshold to switch off the starter [0;1;100]

Data.Name: C_PWM_ACCompValveConverted
Data.Comment: [PWM] Default Value of V_PWM_ACCompValveConverted (when function Compressor Valve Gateway Mode is disabled at initialization) [O;1;255]

Data.Name: C_PWM_ACCompValveSetting
Data.Comment: [PWM] Default Value of V_PWM_ACCompValveSetting (when function "Compressor Valve Regulation" is disabled)[O;1;255]

Data.Name: C_S_VehicleRunnig_max
Data.Comment: [km/h] Vehicle speed above which "VehicleRunning" is activated [0;0.1;10]

Data.Name: C_S_VehicleRunnig_min
Data.Comment: [km/h] Vehicle speed under which "VehicleRunning" is disactivated [0;0.01;10]

Data.Name: C_TM_HalogenStabilization
Data.Comment: [seconds] Duration for stabilization of Halogen Lights when switched on [0:0.01:2,55]

Data.Name: C_TM_IgnON_EngineOFF
Data.Comment: [s] Time out before detecting failure when ignition is ON and engine is stopped [O;0.1;10]

Data.Name: C_TM_OilPressureWarning
Data.Comment: [s] Time out to enable warning if oil pressure is opened and engine RPM is higher than a threshold [O;1;10]

Data.Name: C_TM_QuickStarterCANConfirmation
Data.Comment: [ms] [0;10;5000] Maximum time to receive the CAN confirmation after receiving the trigger from ECM before shuting down the starter

Data.Name: C_TM_StabilizedInLowSpeed
Data.Comment: [seconds] Timeout to ensure a stabilized low speed reached by the front wiper motor [0,0.01,1]

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applicable

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data) Not applicable

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data) Applicable

Item.Text: signal has too few transitions events
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
alive sequence counter incorrect not updated
signal has too many transitions events
circuit short to battery or open
circuit short to ground or open
Device and failure type ODB codding Gen Failure Info
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level outofrange 0 adjust failure
Stop Auto Forbidden - EEM malfunction detected

Data.Name: NumberOfMissions_id
Data.Comment: Identifier of the counter to be reseted.

Item.Text: IS_ST relay opened and ST_CUT relay opened
IS_ST relay closed and ST_CUT relay opened

Request.Name: Read Configuration part number HL Levelizer
Write Configuration part number HL Levelizer

Device.Name: Z_Read Configuration part number HL Levelizer

Screen.Name: Read Configuration part number HL Levelizer

Display.RequestName: Read Configuration part number HL Levelizer

Input.RequestName: Write Configuration part number HL Levelizer

Label.Text: In yellow : values expected to have Stop and Start and ESM available
Electrical Energy Management contact : Andreea BALASETE
